title: Cloud Engineering Journey
summary: Deploying scalable, resilient applications using modern cloud infrastructure.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Hosted on Vercel with automatic CI/CD pipelines from GitHub. Optimized for performance and global edge delivery.

projects.title: Serverless Task API
projects.description: A RESTful API built with AWS Lambda and API Gateway to handle task management logic without provisioning servers.

projects.title: Microservices Cluster
projects.description: Containerized feature services orchestrated with Kubernetes for high availability and fault tolerance.

projects.title: Secure Auth System
projects.description: Implemented robust user authentication and real-time database syncing using Firebase.
